title: aspidium prolongum
intro: Aspidium prolongum, also known as the Ostrich Fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. It is native to North America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, thanks to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The herbal preparations of Aspidium prolongum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
